{{Quote|Do not presume to tell warriors their job.|Vor'corkh to Leia Organa Solo|<ref name="DFR" />}}
'''Vor'corkh''' was a [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] [[dynast]] who encountered [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], the ''[[Mal'ary'ush]]'', in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|And has Khabarakh clan Kihm'bar forgotten what happened to Honoghr forty-eight years ago? If we left the Empire now, we would have no option but to leave our world and hide.|Vor'corkh to Khabarakh|<ref name="DFR" />}}
When the [[Unidentified maitrakh|''maitrakh'']] of [[clan Kihm'bar]] brought a convocate of Noghri people to the [[Grand Dukha|Grand ''Dukha'']] in [[Nystao]], Vor'corkh spat at Leia and said that she spoke only words of discord and poison. Only when [[Ir'khaim]] and nine other dynasts chose to hear her would he grudgingly accept her revelation that the Empire had been purposely enslaving the Noghri for nearly half a century.<ref name="DFR" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
